mapper.insert:
SELECT "ISEQ$$_78230".CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOOK (BOOK_OWNER_ID, BOOK_CASE_ID, BOOK_NAME, PUBLISHER_HOUSE, PRICE, ENTERED_AT, GROUP_CODE_ID, COMMON_CODE_ID, STATE, ISBN, AUTHOR, THUMBNAIL_URL) VALUES (#{bookOwnerId}, #{bookCaseId}, #{bookName}, #{publisherHouse}, #{price}, SYSDATE, #{groupCodeId}, #{commonCodeId}, #{state}, #{isbn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{author, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thumbnailUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM BOOK WHERE ID = #{id} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
SELECT * FROM BOOK WHERE BOOK_OWNER_ID=#{id} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
SELECT * FROM BOOK WHERE BOOK_OWNER_ID=#{id} AND STATE='SOLD' AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE BOOK SET STATE = 'SOLD' WHERE ID = #{id} AND STATE = 'NORMAL'
mapper.select: SELECT B.ID, B.BOOK_OWNER_ID, B.BOOK_CASE_ID, B.BOOK_NAME, B.PUBLISHER_HOUSE, B.PRICE, B.ENTERED_AT, B.GROUP_CODE_ID AS BOOK_GROUP_CODE_ID, B.COMMON_CODE_ID AS BOOK_COMMON_CODE_ID, B.STATE, B.ISBN, B.AUTHOR, B.THUMBNAIL_URL, BC.GROUP_CODE_ID AS BOOK_CASE_GROUP_CODE_ID, BC.COMMON_CODE_ID AS BOOK_CASE_COMMON_CODE_ID, BC.BOOK_CASE_TYPE_ID FROM BOOK B JOIN BOOK_CASE BC ON B.BOOK_CASE_ID = BC.ID WHERE B.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND B.STATE = #{state}
SELECT * FROM BOOK WHERE BOOK_CASE_ID = #{bookCaseId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL

SELECT B.ID, B.BOOK_NAME, B.PUBLISHER_HOUSE, B.PRICE, B.ENTERED_AT, B.BOOK_OWNER_ID, U.NAME AS BOOK_OWNER_NAME, BOP.NICKNAME AS BOOK_OWNER_NICKNAME, B.COMMON_CODE_ID AS GENRE_CODE, CC_GENRE.CODE_NAME AS GENRE_NAME, BC.COMMON_CODE_ID AS LOCATION_CODE, CC_LOC.CODE_NAME AS LOCATION_NAME, BC.ID AS BOOK_CASE_ID, BCT.CODE AS BOOK_CASE_TYPE_CODE, B.ISBN, B.AUTHOR, B.THUMBNAIL_URL FROM BOOK B JOIN USERS U ON B.BOOK_OWNER_ID = U.ID JOIN BOOK_CASE BC ON B.BOOK_CASE_ID = BC.ID JOIN BOOK_CASE_TYPE BCT ON BC.BOOK_CASE_TYPE_ID = BCT.ID LEFT JOIN BOOK_OWNER_PROFILE BOP ON B.BOOK_OWNER_ID = BOP.BOOK_OWNER_ID LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE CC_GENRE ON CC_GENRE.GROUP_CODE = 'BOOK_TYPE' AND CC_GENRE.CODE = B.COMMON_CODE_ID LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE CC_LOC ON CC_LOC.GROUP_CODE = 'LOCATION' AND CC_LOC.CODE = BC.COMMON_CODE_ID WHERE B.ID = #{id} AND B.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND U.DELETED_AT IS NULL
